origin.name: Nigeria
origin.investigating_authority: Nigeria Police Force and state forensic unit
origin.state_variation_note: Nigeria has 36 states and the FCT, each with its own vital statistics office. Lagos and Abuja have the most experienced international funeral providers.
origin.embalming_note: Embalming quality variable outside Lagos and Abuja. Request specialist provider.
origin.source: FCDO Nigeria travel advice, updated 2025; British High Commission Abuja guidance

destinations.name: United Kingdom
special_rules: Documentation is in English throughout. No translation required.
36-state variation: Lagos and Abuja are significantly faster and better resourced.
Police report required for unexpected or unattended deaths.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. Nigerian documentation is in English and typically accepted directly. The coroner for the district is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. British High Commission Abuja and Consulate General Lagos can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: Nigeria to UK Repatriation: Guidance for British Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Nigeria. Repatriation to the UK takes 3-6 weeks. Lagos cargo, police report, and all documentation handled. Contact us 24/7.

destinations.name: Ireland
special_rules: Irish Embassy in Abuja handles consular matters.
Documentation in English throughout. No translation required.
destinations.dest_reception: The Irish funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. Nigerian documentation in English. The Coroner is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: Department of Foreign Affairs emergency line: +353 1 408 2000. The Irish Embassy in Abuja can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: Nigeria to Ireland: Funeral Repatriation Guidance
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Nigeria and needs to come home to Ireland. 3-6 weeks. Lagos cargo and all documentation handled. Contact us 24/7.
